<!-- 
  👋 Welcome! Before you submit your proposal, make sure you have:
  - Discussed your proposal direction with your mentor and the maintainer on Discord
  - Filled in the proposal-team-<mentor>.md file in the Submissions SOSE 2026 directory
  - Checked every item in the checklist below
  
  Your PR title should follow this format:
  [Proposal] Team <Mentor's Name> — <One-line summary of your proposal>
  Example: [Proposal] Team John — Add WebGL shader support to p5.js
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to the correct p5.js issue
- [ ] All team member GitHub usernames filled in
- [ ] Abstract summarises the proposal in 3–5 sentences
- [ ] Impact section has at least one item checked and explained
- [ ] Inclusivity section filled in or marked not applicable
- [ ] Implementation plan has a week-by-week breakdown
- [ ] Deliverables are specific and measurable
- [ ] Discussed with maintainer and community on p5.js Discord before submitting
